title: Graduate Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 At Tink, we deliver open banking solutions as a part of Visa. Weâ€™re creating the foundations that a new world of finance will be built on. By constantly challenging ourselves to go further and do better, weâ€™re developing the ground-breaking services that businesses will use, to revolutionize the way millions of people manage their money. The world of financial services is changing fast, and we will continue to be at the forefront of it. Tink is building an open banking platform that enables banks, fintechs and startups to develop data-driven financial services. Through one API, Tink allows customers to access aggregated financial data, initiate payments, enrich transactions and build personal finance management tools. Tink connects to more than 3,400 banks that reach over 250 million bank customers across Europe. Our solutions are ready-to-go products, each developed to solve specific problems and bring value to both businesses and their customers. When joining our team as a graduate, you will have the opportunity to be at the centre of innovation in the payments industry and drive forward the implementation of the future of Visa. Software Engineering graduates may work across development, test and support on cool things like: Implementation of a single development lifecycle, from Analysis & Design, Build and QA to Security and Deployment. Support the needs of a new application using technologies like Java, REST Services, Micro Services Databases SQL & NoSQL, Docker, Hadoop, Bitbucket, Unix and Shell Scripting and more. Develop tools to improve processes. \*\* We donâ€™t expect you to have years of experience â€” instead, weâ€™re looking for graduates with the right mindset, curiosity, and foundational skills to grow into outstanding engineers. â€¯ This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Graduating in 2026 from Bachelor's/Masters degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or Computer applications and its related field, looking to start working in the summer 2026. Proficiency in at least one programming language or technology including, but not limited, to Java, C++, C# or Python.â€¯ Knowledge of HTML, CSS,â€¯Angular, ML or AI is a plus. The ability to take on challenges and address problems head-on. Highly driven and resourceful. Strong ability to collaborate.
   

  

**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Fullstack Engineer
description:
At Hemnet, we build one of Sweden’s most widely used digital services. Every day, we help people navigate some of life’s biggest decisions and that brings high expectations on quality, reliability, and long-term thinking.
   

  

 We’re now looking for a Fullstack Engineer to join our Seller Domain.The Seller Domain builds products and services that help homeowners make the most of their opportunities in the housing market.
   

  

**About The Role 🍏** 
  

  

 You’ll be part of an experienced, cross-functional team working across both user-facing features and backend systems. You’ll contribute through hands-on development, technical leadership and close collaboration with Product Managers, Designers, Analysts, and Engineers. Together, you’ll build solutions that create real value for sellers.
   

  

 You’ll design, build, and maintain scalable backend services using Node.js and Nest.js, contribute to frontend development in React, and support and evolve APIs across GraphQL and REST. You’ll also play an active role in our transition toward a more service-oriented architecture, helping break down complex problems and move monolithic systems into modular services over time.
   

  

 Beyond day-to-day development, you’ll take part in technical discussions, contribute to architectural direction, support other engineers through collaboration and knowledge sharing, and help us continuously improve code quality, performance, and developer experience. We also hope you’ll contribute to a team culture where different perspectives are valued and people can grow together.
   

  

**Who we think you are** 
 🤩
   

  

 Our current stack includes Ruby and Node.js on the backend and Next.js on the frontend. You’ll work with Ruby in this role, but we don’t expect you to know everything from the start.
   

  

 We think you’re an experienced engineer who enjoys building production-grade systems and working through complex problems together with others. You care about code quality, maintainability, and creating solutions that hold up over time.
   

  

 You’re comfortable contributing to technical decisions, and you like collaborating across disciplines to build products that are useful and thoughtful. You don’t need to tick every box on day one, what matters most is that you bring solid engineering experience, a learning mindset, and a generous way of working with others.
   

  

**What You’ll Do 💥** 
  

  

* Build and improve Hemnet’s products across the system.
* Take part in technical discussions and architectural decisions
* Work closely with product, design, and analytics.
* Contribute to a sustainable pace, high quality, and a great developer experience.
* You’ll use AI tools as part of your day-to-day work, for example to explore ideas, speed up implementation, improve code quality, and support learning and collaboration across the team.


  

  

**I am your new manager 👋** 
  

  

 My name is Johan Boberg, I joined Hemnet in June, prior to Hemnet I worked at Blocket for many years. I have a long career behind me as Engineering Manager and before that, as Backend Developer.
   

  

 As a manager, I am supportive and humble, my goal is to create an environment where you can feel trusted, be challenged and empowered to grow. My job is to lead the team to a productive and creative space where everyone can contribute.
   

  

**A Note on Inclusion 💚** 
  

  

 At Hemnet, we believe that diversity in gender, sexual orientation, ability, neurodiversity, cultural background and life experience makes us stronger. We welcome applicants of all identities and backgrounds.
   

  

 If you meet many but not all of the requirements, we encourage you to apply. We value curiosity, a strong sense of purpose and the motivation to learn and grow, alongside your skills and experiences.
   

  

**A Hybrid Way of Working 🚲** 
  

  

 Our vibrant office in central Stockholm is the hub of our collaboration and culture, providing a lively space that fosters team spirit. We come together in the office three days a week, with two flexible remote days. To be part of our team, it’s essential to be based in or near Stockholm.

title: Software engineer
description:
**🌍 About Yayloh** 
 At Yayloh, we are on a mission to make e-commerce sustainable. The fashion industry faces a massive environmental challenge: high return rates lead to unnecessary transport, waste, and a staggering carbon footprint.
   

  

 We build the digital infrastructure that helps brands understand
 *why* 
 returns happen, reducing waste and helping the planet one return at a time. We are a small, agile team where data-driven decisions meet environmental impact.
   

  

**🛠️ The Role: Backend with a Fullstack Heart** 
 We are looking for a
 **Master’s Graduate (** 
**M.Sc** 
**.)** 
 with a 5-year background in Computer Science or equivalent, to help build the future of sustainable retail.
   

  

 While your core focus will be our
 **Python** 
 and
 **MySQL** 
 backend, we operate with a "get it done" mindset. This means you’ll occasionally step into our
 **React/TypeScript** 
 frontend or even into our
 **AWS infrastructure** 
 to ensure a seamless experience for our merchants. You aren’t just a coder; you’re a problem solver who uses the best tools available—including AI—to build elegant, scalable solutions.
   

  

**💎 What We Offer**
* Purpose: Work on a product that directly reduces carbon emissions and textile waste.
* Balance: 5 weeks of paid vacation to recharge.
* Future: Employee stock options – we want you to own a piece of the impact you create.
* Security: Service pension (Tjänstepension) and competitive benefits.
* Growth: A high-autonomy environment where you can influence the tech stack and product roadmap.


**📋 Requirements**
* Education: A recently completed Master’s degree (M.Sc.) in Computer Science or equivalent.
* Right to Work: You must currently hold the legal right to work in Sweden.
* Tech Interests: Proficiency in (or a strong desire to master) Python, MySQL, and React/TypeScript.
* Critical Thinking: The ability to look at an AI-generated solution and ask, "Is this actually efficient, or just shiny?"


**🚀 The "AI-Human Collaboration" Application** 
 We don't want a standard cover letter. We want to see how you work with the tools of the future. To apply, please submit a link to the working
 **prototype** 
 and the
 **GitHub repository** 
 of a project you’ve built (any tech stack).
   

  

**In your README or commit history, you must highlight:**
* AI Usage: How you used AI (Cursor, Copilot, LLMs) to build the project.
* The "Hallucination" Commit: Link to at least one specific commit where the AI failed—either by suggesting a "Rube Goldberg" solution (too complex) or by hallucinating a library/logic.
* The Fix: Show us how you caught the error and how you simplified or corrected the code in the followup commits.


**Why this?** 
 Because at Yayloh, we value the human engineer who directs the AI, not the one who follows it blindly.

title: Frontend Intern
description:
**Company** 




 GenerationXYZ is a media platform that bridges the generational gap, combining AI-driven publishing with traditional editorial rigor to deliver high-quality, accessible content. We explore cutting-edge technologies, profile disruptive startups, connect with visionary founders and analyze ideas shaping the future. Built on the principles of inclusion and mutual respect, we welcome diverse perspectives and prioritize clear, engaging communication. At GenerationXYZ, innovation meets collaboration to inspire thought dialogue across all generations.
 



  





**Role** 




 We are looking for a Front-End Developer Intern to help build and improve the GenerationXYZ platform. The role involves collaborating with the development team to work on user-facing features across our website and publishing experience, helping create fast, responsive, and intuitive interfaces. The role includes implementing UI components, improving usability, integrating APIs, fixing front-end issues, and collaborating with product, content and design in a fast-moving startup environment.
 



  





**Qualifications** 



* Good knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
* Experience with React, Vue or Angular
* Understanding of responsive design and UI/UX fundamentals
* Ability to turn mockups or wireframes into clean front-end code
* Familiarity with Git and version control workflows
* Strong debugging and problem-solving skills
* Ability to communicate clearly and work well in a team
* Familiarity with APIs and async data handling is a plus
* Studying or recently completed Computer Science, Web Development, or a related field

title: Front End Developer
description:
**Why join us?**
 We’re on a mission to empower people with disabilities to do what they once did or never thought possible. As the world-leader in assistive communication solutions, we empower our customers to express themselves, connect with the world, and live richer lives.
   

  

 At Tobii Dynavox, you can grow your career within a dynamic, global company that has a clear, impactful purpose - with the flexibility to also do what truly matters to you outside of work. What’s more, you’ll be part of a work culture where collaboration is the norm and individuality is welcomed.
   

  

 As a member of our team, you’ll have the power to innovate for good. You’ll see your ideas in use in new applications, work with the latest technology on leading platforms, and deliver meaningful solutions for our customers.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a
 **Front-end Developer** 
 , you will contribute to building and launching our global headless digital experience. You will design, build, and maintain React based front-end applications, ensuring components are reusable, accessible, and scalable across regions, languages and end applications.
   

  

 You will be hands-on developing multilanguage, personalized, and authenticated user experiences powered by headless content management systems (CMS) and customer identity and access management (CIAM) integrations. Your work will include React development, collaboration on the global design system, and integrating front-end applications with APIs, CIAM, and backend services. You will partner closely with Product, UX, Engineering teams, and our Senior Front-end Developer.
   

  

 Your contributions will enable a production ready front-end React-based front-end experience, reusable design system components, personalized and authenticated user flows across markets, and a scalable React codebase system components, personalized and authenticated user flows across markets, and a scalable React codebase.
   

  

**Please note:** 
 This is a
 **fixed-term** 
 (from 1 June 2026 until 31 October 2026) and
 **hybrid role** 
 (2 days per week) based
 **in Östermalm, Stockholm** 
 .
   

  

**In this role you will:**
* Develop scalable React component architectures and state management patterns.
* Support multilanguage and multi-region experiences, ensuring correct content rendering.
* Support MVP launch, testing, and iteration while maintaining clean, reusable, and well-documented React code.
* Implement UI logic and personalized experiences based on user accounts, roles, regions, and language preferences.
* Integrate React applications with headless CMS platforms (e.g., Contentful, Sanity) and connect front-end experiences to APIs, CIAM, and back-end services.
* Implement CIAM-driven authentication and personalization flows within React applications.
* Optimize React applications for performance, accessibility, SEO, and responsive behavior across devices.


**What We’re Looking For**
 We’re looking for an organized and adaptable experienced professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment, can both work independently and in team setting, and brings a service-oriented mindset.
   

  

**Ideal candidates will bring:**
* 5+ years of hands-on front-end development experience, including React, modern React frameworks (e.g., Next.js), and headless CMS platforms, preferably in multilanguage or multimarket environments.
* Deep understanding of React fundamentals (e.g., component architecture, hooks, state management, and front-end performance optimization) and previous experience contributing to or building design systems or component libraries.
* Experience developing role-based and personalized user experiences and CIAM integrations for login and personalization flows.
* Strong understanding of accessibility standards (WCAG) is preferred.
* Professional fluency in written and spoken English.
* Experience with agile methodologies is a plus.


**Apply today!**
 We believe in empowering individuals - including our own employees - to reach their full potential. So, if you want to change lives while growing your own career, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**Where we stand:**
 We believe diversity not only enriches our workplace culture, but also gives us a strategic advantage. Working with people from a variety of backgrounds and perspectives helps us all become better communicators, better problem solvers, and better human beings. Our differences make us stronger.
   

  

 Tobii Dynavox values equality of opportunity, human dignity, and racial/ethnic and cultural diversity. Tobii Dynavox does not discriminate against individuals on the basis of race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, disability, age, veteran status, ancestry, or national or ethnic origin.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Employer/AA Women/Minorities/Veterans/Disabled

title: Software engineer - Core platform
description:
We are looking for a
 **Software Engineer** 
 to join our tech team at KanEL. You’ll work on the core systems that power our platform, building, operating, and evolving the infrastructure that connects our energy assets, data, and services.
   

  

 KanEL is an
 **AI-first energy company** 
 , where modern tools are part of how we design, build, and operate systems. With a small and focused team, you’ll take real ownership of production systems that are critical to our business.
   

  

 You will work across
 **backend services, data pipelines, and infrastructure** 
 , ensuring our platform is reliable, scalable, and easy to evolve.
   

  

 Key responsibilities
   

  

* Design, build, and operate core platform services
* Own systems end to end, from development to production
* Improve performance, scalability, and observability
* Ensure reliable data flows from connected energy assets
* Use modern tools, including AI-assisted workflows, to improve speed and quality
* Collaborate with the team on architecture and technical decisions


 Who we are looking for
   

  

* 3+ years of experience building and operating production systems
* Comfortable owning services in production, not just writing code
* Experience working with cloud infrastructure (AWS or similar)
* Experience working with databases and real-world data
* Structured, pragmatic, and able to move forward in unclear situations
* Curious about improving how you work, including using AI tools
* Good communication skills in Swedish and English
* Enjoys working in a small team with high ownership


 Stand out with
   

  

* Experience designing systems for reliability and scale
* Experience with real-time or event-driven systems
* Experience with infrastructure as code
* Experience working with IoT, hardware, or physical systems
* Strong habits around monitoring, debugging, and improving systems in production
* Proactive in adopting and evaluating new tools, including AI-assisted workflows


 Location
   

  

 Situated near the Slussen subway station in central Stockholm, we value collaboration and face-to-face interactions at the HQ, while also supporting a hybrid work model.
   

  

 Why KanEL
   

  

 This is the place to be if you’re excited about transforming the energy landscape.
   

  

* Work with a small, experienced team building real infrastructure
* Large freedom under responsibility
* Opportunity to own and shape critical systems
* Grow in a fast-evolving industry
* Be early and help shape both the company and your role
* Employee pension
* Employee stock options

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Visa’s Technology Organization is a community of problem solvers and innovators reshaping the future of commerce. We operate the world’s most sophisticated processing networks capable of handling more than 65k secure transactions a second across 80M merchants, 15k Financial Institutions, and billions of everyday people. While working with us you’ll get to work on complex distributed systems and solve massive scale problems centered on new payment flows, business and data solutions, cyber security, and B2C platforms.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 We are looking for Versatile, curious, and energetic Software Engineers who embrace solving complex challenges on a global scale. As a Visa Software Engineer, you will be an integral part of a multi-functional development team inventing, designing, building, and testing software products that reach a truly global customer base. While building components of powerful payment technology, you will get to see your efforts shaping the digital future of monetary transactions.
   

  

**The Work Itself**
* Design code and systems that touch 40% of the world population while influencing Visa’s internal standards for scalability, security, and reusability
* Collaborate multi-functionally to create design artifacts and develop best-in-class software solutions for multiple Visa technical offerings
* Actively contribute to product quality improvements, valuable service technology, and new business flows in diverse agile squads
* Develop robust and scalable products intended for a myriad of customers including end-user merchants, b2b, and business to government solutions.
* Leverage innovative technologies to build the next generation of Payment Services, Transaction Platforms, Real-Time Payments, and Buy Now Pay Later Technology
* Opportunities to make a difference on a global or local scale through mentorship and continued learning opportunities


**Essential Functions**
* Demonstrates relevant technical working knowledge to understand requirements.
* Identifies and contributes to the development and solution strategies to team members that improve the design and functionality of interface features across one or more project features, under minimal guidance.
* Applies standard processes on the use of programming languages (e.g. HTML, C++, Java) to write code that fulfills website modification requests and technical requirements.
* Collaborates with others to support the piloting of new technology capabilities and features that enhance the user website experience across e-commerce products.
* Analyzes bugs for simple issues and applies debugging tools to verify assumptions.


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in the office will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications: 2+ years of relevant work experience and a Bachelors degree, OR 5+ years of relevant work experience Preferred Qualifications: 3 or more years of work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or more than 2 years of work experience with an Advanced Degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD) Energy and Experience: A growth mindset that is curious and passionate about technologies and enjoys challenging projects on a global scale Challenge the Status Quo: Comfort in pushing the boundaries, ‘hacking’ beyond traditional solutions Language Expertise: Expertise in one or more general development languages (e.g., Java, C#, C++) Builder: Experience building and deploying modern services and web applications with quality and scalability Learner: Constant drive to learn new technologies such as Angular, React, Kubernetes, Docker, etc. Partnership: Experience collaborating with Product, Test, Dev-ops, and Agile/Scrum teams We do not expect that any single candidate would fulfill all of these characteristics. For instance, we have exciting team members who are really focused on building scalable systems but didn’t work with payments technology or web applications before joining Visa
   

  

**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 At Tink, we deliver open banking solutions as a part of Visa. We’re creating the foundations that a new world of finance will be built on. By constantly challenging ourselves to go further and do better, we’re developing the ground-breaking services that businesses will use, to revolutionize the way millions of people manage their money. The world of financial services is changing fast, and we will continue to be at the forefront of it.
   

  

 Tink is building an open banking platform that enables banks, fintechs and startups to develop data-driven financial services. Through one API, Tink allows customers to access aggregated financial data, initiate payments, enrich transactions and build personal finance management tools. Tink connects to more than 3,400 banks that reach over 250 million bank customers across Europe. Our solutions are ready-to-go products, each developed to solve specific problems and bring value to both businesses and their customers.
   

  

 We are looking for talented, curious, and energetic Fullstack Software Engineers who embrace solving complex challenges on a global scale.  As a Visa Software Engineer, you will be an integral part of a cross-functional development team inventing, designing, building, and testing software products that reach a truly global customer base. While building components of cutting-edge payment technology, you will get to see your efforts shaping the digital future of monetary transactions.
   

  

 The Work itself:
   

  

* Design code and systems that touch 40% of the world population while influencing Visa’s internal standards for scalability, security, and reusability
* Collaborate cross-functionally to create design artifacts and develop best-in-class software solutions for multiple Visa technical offerings
* Actively contribute to product quality improvements, value added service technology, and new business flows in diverse agile squads
* Develop robust and scalable products intended for a myriad of customers including end-user merchants, b2b, and business to government solutions

 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications:
   

  

* Bachelors degree OR relevant work experience


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Technical Expertise: Experience developing front-end code (e.g., Angular, React) and APIs for software applications (e.g. Node.js, Golang). Knowledge of database software for maintaining and manipulating data. Understanding of systems integration processes and data structures for efficient operations.
* Growth & Innovation Mindset: Curiosity and passion for technology, comfort in challenging traditional solutions, and a drive to learn modern tools like Kubernetes, and Docker.
* Problem-Solving: Ability to approach problems logically and creatively, asking questions and seeking solutions.
* Collaboration: Willingness to work in a team, share ideas, and learn from peers and mentors.
* Adaptability: Openness to feedback, learning new technologies, and adapting to changing priorities.


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: .NET Software Engineer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* Is hands-on and experienced, preferably with 10–18 years in software engineering, and still passionate about coding
* Has strong .NET (C#) skills, particularly in integration, APIs, and cloud-native solutions in Azure
* Has practical experience with test automation, TDD/BDD, and an understanding of the test pyramid
* Has experience with feature flags/toggles
* Is comfortable with CI/CD pipelines and automating builds, tests, and deployments
* Is actively engaged in AI for software development and open to exploring new AI-driven workflows
* Is an advocate for clean code, refactoring, and continuous improvement
* Is a clear communicator who can inspire and elevate the team
* Enjoys Agile ways of working and thrives in change
* Is familiar with infrastructure as code, monitoring, and logging


**Application deadline:** 
 07-04-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Software Engineer
description:
*Vill du göra samhällsnytta och bidra till Sveriges oberoende i världen? Vi söker nu en teknisk rockstar som är vass på Java och inte blir avskräckt av riktigt stora datamängder. Du är alltid hungrig på nya kunskaper och vill använda din dyrbara tid till att göra Sverige säkrare. På FRA arbetar vi med unika uppgifter – för Sveriges säkerhet och integritet.*
**Ditt uppdrag**
 I rollen som Software Engineer utvecklar och underhåller du lösningar som tolkar, bearbetar och lagrar stora mängder inhämtad data. Du utvecklar även användarapplikationer som gör data tillgänglig för användning i verksamhetens underrättelseproduktion. Världen förändras och så även vårt data. Därför sker kontinuerlig utveckling i takt med att nya krav och behov uppstår.
   

  

 Du kommer att ingå i ett team med helhetsansvar för sina system. Teamet jobbar agilt med eget ansvar för utveckling och drift av hela stacken. Teamet har ett nära samarbete med andra delar inom produktionen av analys och bearbetningsförmågor, både med slutanvändare och andra tekniska team som förser systemet med data.
   

  

 Vi strävar alltid efter att våra medarbetare ska trivas och utvecklas. Vi ser det som en förutsättning för teamets effektivitet. Via utbildningar, konferenser och egen omvärldsbevakning håller vi oss uppdaterade på den senaste tekniken. Tillsammans utvärderar vi och tar del av varandras insikter.
   

  

**Du kan**
**Du Har Följande Kompetens/erfarenhet**
* Goda kunskaper i Java
* JavaScript / TypeScript
* Högskoleutbildning inom datateknik, systemvetenskap eller liknande område, alternativt förvärvat motsvarande kompetens genom arbetslivserfarenhet
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i såväl tal som skrift


 För Oss Är Det Viktigt Att Du Är Nyfiken, Ödmjuk Och Har Ett Driv Att Lära Dig Nya Saker. Det Är Även Meriterande För Tjänsten Om Du Har Erfarenhet Från Ett Eller Flera Av Följande Områden
   

  

* Big Data
* Iceberg / Delta Lake
* Relationsdatabaser
* NoSQL-databaser
* Spark
* Trino
* Angular
* Linux
* Kubernetes / Docker
* Informationsmodellering / Datamodellering


**Du är**
 Vi kommer lägga stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper. Därför tror vi att du till din natur är nyfiken på nya tekniker och håller dig uppdaterad om vad som händer, både vad gäller arbetsmetoder och nya produkter. Du arbetar bra med komplexa frågor. Du analyserar, bryter ner och löser komplicerade problem. Du delar entusiastiskt med dig av dina kunskaper och lockas av möjligheten att vara med och påverka framtida teknikval och lösningar. Dessutom tycker du det är spännande och känner en stolthet i att få vara med och bygga utökad underrättelseförmåga för FRA.
   

  

**Om FRA**
 FRA har omvärlden som sin arena där varje arbetsuppgift är en del av något större. På ett eller annat sätt får du som medarbetare vara med och bidra till att skydda Sveriges integritet och oberoende i världen. Du är med och gör skillnad på riktigt, varje dag.
   

  

 Vår uppgift som underrättelsetjänst är att skydda Sverige mot de allvarligaste hot som kan riktas mot ett samhälle – militära angrepp, terrorism och cyberattacker. Vi skyddar det viktigaste vi har – vår trygghet, vår demokrati och vårt sätt att leva. Vi är experter på cyberområdet och signalspaning samt en larmklocka för militära hot.
   

  

 FRA leder sedan 2024 Nationellt cybersäkerhetscenter, NCSC, vars uppdrag är att utveckla och stärka Sveriges förmåga att förebygga, upptäcka och hantera cyberhot.
   

  

 Som nyanställd på FRA får du en omfattande introduktionsutbildning och kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling, vilket ger dig möjlighet att utveckla dina färdigheter och bli ännu bättre på det du brinner för. Vår organisation är mångfacetterad och består av olika kompetenser och personligheter, där varje individ har unika egenskaper och förutsättningar. Vi strävar efter att skapa en miljö där alla känner sig välkomna och trygga. Utöver en stimulerande arbetsmiljö erbjuder vi också ett attraktivt förmånspaket, som du kan läsa mer om på www.fra.se . För mer information om Nationellt cybersäkerhetscenter besök www.ncsc.se
   

  

 För din trygghet. För vår demokrati. Varje dag. Året om.
   

  

**Mer information**
 Arbetsplatsen är belägen i närheten av Drottningholm, ca 10 min från Brommaplan. Svenskt medborgarskap är ett krav då anställning vid FRA innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. Innan en anställning kommer du att säkerhetsprövas i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagens bestämmelser. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. Vi tillämpar sex månaders provanställning. I denna rekryteringsprocess kommer arbetsprov/tester att tillämpas. För mer information är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef på nummer 010-557 49 53. Fackliga företrädare nås på 010-557 46 00.
   

  

 Vi tar emot ansökningar via www.fra.se
 **senast 2026-04-05**
 Referensnummer
 **2024FRA2158-5**
 Då vi inför denna rekrytering redan tagit ställning till de rekryteringskanaler vi önskar använda undanber vi oss att bli kontaktade för ytterligare erbjudanden om annonserings- och rekryteringshjälp.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**What You’ll Do At Elekta**
 At Elekta, we're expanding our Software team in the Neuro business line treatment planning, and we are currently looking for a
 **Senior C++ developer.**
 We develop Leksell GammaPlan, an integrated treatment planning system for the Leksell Gamma Knife®. By creating efficient, dependable, and high-performance software solutions, your contributions will directly support medical professionals in planning personalised and accurate cancer treatments. For more information about the system you will help improve, please visit: Leksell GammaPlan® | Stereotactic Radiosurgery | Elekta.
   

  

 Our product is a Linux desktop based system featuring large GUI desktop applications written in C++. Our ideal candidate will have over seven years of experience with relevant systems, as well as some of the following:
   

  

* Mathematical modelling of anatomical structures or radiation dosage
* Communication with other hospital equipment
* Cybersecurity
* Maintaining and updating a customised Linux distribution
* Experience in developing medical systems (or other regulated systems) is advantageous but not mandatory.


**What you bring:**
 To succeed in this role, you should enjoy collaborating in an Agile team environment and be comfortable discussing, presenting, reviewing, and validating your work and that of your team before it reaches end users. We collaborate closely with multiple other teams and departments within the company, so strong interpersonal skills are important.
   

  

 We also expect you to have:
   

  

* A university degree in Computer Science, Engineering Physics, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline.
* Professional proficiency in English.


**Hiring process**
 We are looking forward to hearing from you! Apply by submitting your application and résumé in English, via the “Apply” button, at the latest on 26th April 2026. Please note that we do not accept applications by e-mail.
   

  

**Your Elekta contact**
 For questions, please contact Mark Tazewell,

title: Software Engineer, Cloud - Sustaining Engineering
description:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation, and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.
   

  

 The company is founder-led, profitable, and growing.
   

  

 We are hiring a Software Engineer, Sustaining Engineering for ...
   

  

* a fast-paced engineering role in Linux-based software-defined infrastructure and applications, covering all layers of the stack, including bare metal, virtualization (KVM) and containerization (Docker, LXC/LXD), storage (Ceph and Linux filesystems), networking (OVS, OVN and Core networking), up to OpenStack and Kubernetes, and the open source applications running on top of them.


 This role is an opportunity for a technologist with a passion for Linux and open source to build a career with Canonical and drive success for our customers, community and the company. If you have an affinity for open source development, great communication skills, and a passion for troubleshooting and fixing issues in technology used by millions across the world, then you will enjoy working with some of the best people in the industry at Canonical.
   

  

**Location** 
 : This is a globally remote role.
   

  

 This role deals with critical issues in the open source stack that require software engineering for upstream fixes. Our engineers have to be able to work productively at any level of the stack above the kernel, in a wide range of languages, to understand and address the software issues at hand. Our group is critical to the success of our enterprise customers, partners and Ubuntu itself.
   

  

 You will help with troubleshooting and driving issues to resolution with workarounds, guidance, and fixes to be released upstream and in Ubuntu.
   

  

 This role entails
   

  

* Resolving complex customer problems related to Ubuntu, OpenStack, or Kubernetes and other open source software
* Maintaining a close working relationship with Canonical's field, support and product engineering teams
* Participating in upstream communities
* Developing fixes, backporting patches, and working with upstream for inclusion
* Reviewing code produced by other engineers
* Demonstrating good judgement in technical methods and techniques
* Prioritizing work and managing your time effectively against those priorities
* Participating in team discussions to improve processes, tools, and documentation
* Maintaining clear, technical and concise communications
* Working from home and travel internationally up to 10% of work time for team meetings, events and conferences


 What we are looking for in you
   

  

* Professional experience as a software engineer
* Background in Computer Science, STEM or similar
* Strong experience with Linux, OpenStack, Kubernetes or other cloud technologies
* Strong development-level experience with Python, Go, C, C++ on Linux
* Ability to troubleshoot with gdb and other tools
* Familiarity with git source code repositories and branches
* An exceptional academic track record from both high school and preferably university
* Willingness to travel up to 4 times a year for internal events


 Nice-to-have skills
   

  

* You love technology and working with brilliant people
* You are curious, flexible, articulate, and accountable
* You value soft skills and are passionate, enterprising, thoughtful, and self-motivated
* You have interest in, and experience with most of the following: Ubuntu Linux - kernel or userspace, Kubernetes, OpenStack, Ceph, QEMU/KVM, LXC/LXD, Python, Go, C, Postgresql, Mongo, Debian packaging, distributed systems


 What we offer colleagues
   

  

 We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognize outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus. We provide all team members with additional benefits, which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person - we've been working remotely since 2004!
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Employee Assistance Programme
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues from your team and others
* Priority Pass for travel and travel upgrades for long haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open-source projects and the platform for AI, IoT, and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence; in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since our inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

 Canonical is an equal opportunity employer
   

  

 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

title: QA Engineer
description:
*We're at a pivotal moment for both Tibber and the planet. When joining Tibber, you won’t just help scale a forward-thinking tech company – you’ll contribute to a real shift in how people consume electricity. With millions of smart devices connected to the Tibber platform (like electric vehicles and smart thermostats), we have one of the most unique energy trading portfolios on the market.*
*We’re looking for a QA Engineer to join us in making the energy transition happen – maybe that’s you?*
**Job Mission 🚀**
 As a Quality Engineer at Tibber, you won’t just be finding bugs; you’ll help build the machinery that prevents them. You will play a pivotal role in designing the technical infrastructure and cultural frameworks that allow Tibber to scale without friction.
   

  

 Your goal is to ensure our engineers have the tools, environments, and automated workflows needed to ship world-class software with confidence. You aren't a gatekeeper, you are an accelerator. With a strong focus on the overlap of quality and developer experience, you will help our teams stay productive, even as complexity grows.
   

  

**What You'll Do ✅**
* Strategise & Influence: Work closely with engineering leadership to identify high-impact areas and ensure quality efforts are focused where they matter most.
* Architect Test Environments: Own and evolve our test environments in collaboration with engineering teams, ensuring they are stable, reproducible, and scalable.
* Build the Foundation: Collaborate with the Cloud Platform and DevEx team to build quality support systems that scale across a distributed architecture.
* Full-Stack Automation: Design and maintain automated testing frameworks that support our diverse ecosystem - from high-throughput backends and GraphQL schemas to web frontends and native mobile apps.
* Preach the Quality Gospel: Actively mentor engineers and leaders to instill a "Shift Left" mindset. You’ll help teams establish the standards and metrics needed to own quality throughout the entire development cycle.


**What We're Looking For⚡**
 You are driven by impact and used to fast-paced environments, and you thrive when given clear goals and high accountability. The areas below summarises our ideal candidate:
   

  

* The Polyglot Mindset: You are comfortable jumping into different codebases. Whether it's a microservice in .NET or a mobile component in Swift, you can understand the logic and work with the engineers to find the best ways to test it.
* CI/CD Native: You have deep experience with CI/CD technologies and understand how infrastructure supports (or hinders) quality.
* The Evangelist: You love teaching others and bridging the gap between technical excellence and business impact. You can convince a busy developer that a robust integration test today saves a weekend of on-call duty, but you can just as easily articulate the ROI of quality to a PM or business stakeholder.
* The Self-Starter: You have the autonomy to identify gaps and the initiative to close them. You don't wait for a ticket; you see a bottleneck and you build a bypass.
* The Orchestrator: You are your own best Project Manager. You know how to break down complex architectural goals - like migrating a test suite or spinning up a new staging environment - into actionable milestones. You can manage your own backlog, prioritize ruthlessly based on business risk, and keep stakeholders informed without needing a PM to tail you. You don’t just start projects; you drive them to the finish line.
* The Quality Scientist: You don’t guess; you hypothesise, test, and measure. You are obsessed with observability and data - not just for production uptime, service performance or where we find bugs, but as a "microscope" into the health of our output. You have a natural curiosity for identifying new ways to measure quality and impact, turning "technical hunches" into hard, reproducible data.


**💆🏻‍♀️💆🏽‍♂️The Tibber Mindset**
 Tibber is not your typical energy supplier. Our tech helps hundreds of thousands of households lower and shift their energy consumption to more sustainable and affordable hours. We’re here to accelerate the energy transition – not in theory, but in everyday life.
   

  

 Being on a mission to change an industry, fundamentally also means being prepared for the unexpected. We do what others say can’t be done, try and fail together but never lose sight of our users. We work passionately with sustainability and a circular approach, both with our own products and in the entire ecosystem that is affected by everything we do.
   

  

 Starting out with two passionate founders in 2016, we're now 300+ people working for Tibber in our offices in Stockholm, Førde, Berlin, Amsterdam, and Oslo. We will continue to grow within our markets, and we are thrilled to be backed by investors like Balderton Capital, Eight Roads Ventures, Founders Fund, Summa, and Schibsted.
   

  

*Diversity of thought fuels better products, so we welcome applicants of every background, identity and lived experience. Ready to be part of powering the energy transition?* 
***Apply below!***

title: AI Software Developer i Stockholm
description:
***Vi tror på- och vill förverkliga en AI- och datadriven framtid. Vi söker AI Software Developers som vill vara med och hjälpa våra kunder inom olika branscher att omvandla AI-experiment till skalbara, säkra och värdeskapande lösningar.***




  





 Hos oss blir du del av ett växande område med runt 20 konsulter inom Cloud, AI och systemutveckling. Samtidigt får du kollegor från hela Solita med expertis i allt från data, strategi och mycket mer att dela kunskap och perspektiv med, läs mer om det här.
 



  





 När vi växer gör dina möjligheter också det, du får vara med och påverka kulturen, affären och din roll.
 



  





**En dag på Solita** 




 En dag på Solita kan börja med ett standup-möte med ditt team på kunduppdraget, ibland består det av fler kollegor från Solita. Är det fredag kanske du jobbar från Solitas kontor i Stockholm för att starta dagen med frukost. Andra dagar jobbar du från kundens kontor eller hemifrån.
 



  





 Sen kliver du in i ditt arbete: när du stöter på ett problem söker du upp en lång diskussionstråd i slack med insikter från kollegor som haft samma problem. Andra gånger passar du på att fråga en kollega vid kaffemaskinen om deras perspektiv för att komma vidare. Du kan också delta i våra interna utbildningsmöten, där vi delar kunskap om allt från nya teknologier och arbetssätt till välmående. Vissa dagar avslutar du med AW, filmkväll, brädspel eller annan aktivitet du och kollegor tycker är kul.
 



  





**Din roll som AI Software Developer** 




 Du är med i hela utvecklingscykeln, inte sällan från tidigt pre-sales stadie eller i förstudier, för att utveckla, driftsätta och optimera agent-baserade och datadrivna system som hjälper kunder fatta bättre beslut eller automatisera processer på ett intelligent sätt. Exempelvis kan du arbeta med prompt optimering, designa och implementera RAG-arkitektur, utveckla AI-agenter, MCP-servrar, APIer och backend lösningar för att integrera befintliga system till LLM-tjänster. Läs mer om att jobba med AI på Solita här.
 



  





 Utöver moderna systemutveckling-tekniker kommer du arbeta med diverse AI-verktyg och ramverk som exempelvis LangChain, Tensorflow, AI Foundry och Semantic Kernel för att nämna några. Då vi jobbar teknikagnostiskt får du stor frihet att forma teknikval och arkitektur för att möta affärsbehov. Läs mer om hur kollegor jobbar och diskuterar kring olika teknikval i vår Dev blog här.
 



  





**Känner du igen dig i följande?** 




 Du kan kommunicera på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift. Det är ett plus om du varit konsult tidigare men det huvudsakliga är din förmåga att snabbt komma in i nya sammanhang och lära dig. Du är trygg i rollen tack vare din erfarenhet av både systemutveckling (särskilt om du jobbat i C# .NET eller Java Spring Boot) samt:
 


* RAG- eller AI-agentarkitektur
* Att bygga AI-drivna applikationer med moderna ramverk som ex. Semantic Kernel, LangChain eller liknande.
* Att implementera molnbaserade AI-tjänster och produktionssätta AI-lösningar med hjälp av DevSecOps och IaC.



  





 Vi letar inte bara efter tekniska skills, vi vill jobba med dig som tar ansvar för att bygga rätt lösningar på rätt sätt genom att utmana med omtanke. Du ser kod som ett hantverk, inte bara ett medel till funktion: du bryr dig om kvalitet, läsbarhet och hållbarhet. Du kommer trivas hos oss om du tycker om att dela med dig av din kunskap lika mycket som du är nyfiken på- och lyfter andras.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 Vår företagskultur är väldigt viktig för oss. Vi värdesätter låg hierarki, självständighet och ansvar, värdeskapande arbete och trevliga kollegor. Här kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, och här kan du bläddra bland våra tech-bloggar.
 


* **Meningsfulla projekt:** 
 Arbeta i en agil miljö där du kan påverka teknikval och arbetssätt för att skapa de bästa lösningarna
* **Flexibilitet och autonomi** 
 för att utforma ditt arbete med flextider– läs mer från vår blogg.
* **Ständig utveckling:** 
 Vi erbjuder kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling för att säkerställa att våra medarbetare ligger längst fram i teknikutvecklingen.
* **Innovativ kultur:** 
 Arbeta tillsammans med några av de främsta experterna inom data, analys och utveckling



  





 Utöver detta får du även ta del av följande
 **förmåner:** 




 💰 Fast lön oberoende av beläggningsgrad med möjlighet till löneväxling till ditt pensionssparande
 



 🏦 Pensionsavsättning i linje med ITP1 samt möjlighet till löneväxling till ditt pensionssparande vid inkomst över 8,07 inkomstbasbelopp
 



 🏖️ 30 semesterdagar
 



 😃 Sjukvårdsförsäkring för både din mentala och fysiska hälsa som täcker dig även utanför tjänstetid
 



 🏋️ Friskvårdsbidrag på 5000 kr via Benifex (tidigare Benify).
 



 💻 Ett brett nätverk av erfarna specialister från olika områden inom tech att samarbeta med
 



 🔗 Intern coach för att stödja ditt välbefinnande
 



 🪩 After Work och hobbyaktiviteter
 



 🥐 Fredagsfrukost
 



  





**Vilka är vi?** 




 Solita är ett värderingsstyrt konsultbolag med över 2000 medarbetare i 9 länder, varav ca 230 i Sverige. Vår storlek gör oss tillräckligt stora för att vara en stabil och innovativ arbetsgivare, men samtidigt tillräckligt små för att värna om våra medarbetare och kunder. Med bred kompetens inom digital transformation erbjuder vi en dynamisk arbetsmiljö. Hos oss får du friheten att utvecklas, både professionellt och personligt.
 



  





**Intresserad av att höra mer?** 




 Låter det som en spännande möjlighet? Skicka in din ansökan och bli en del av vårt team som ligger i framkant av AI-utveckling!
 



  





 Om du har några frågor, skriv gärna till Rebecca Hammel på LinkedIn eller mailadressen rebecca.hammel@solita.se. Du kan också kontakta rekryteringsansvarig, Louise Doverholt på LinkedIn eller mailadressen louise.doverholt@solita.se .
 



  





**Hur ser processen ut?** 




 I rekryteringsprocessen tror vi på en snabb och effektiv process. Du ansöker med CV eller LinkedIn och svarar på några korta frågor. Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande. Om vi ser en potentiell matchning, bjuder vi in dig till ett första möte för att lära känna dig och berätta mer om vår kultur och våra värderingar på Solita. I andra intervjun fokuserar vi på din tekniska kompetens och din erfarenhet. Om allt går bra tar vi oss vidare till sista steget där vi presenterar ett erbjudande och välkomnar dig som ny Solitan!

title: Data & AI Platform Engineer – Technical Lead
description:
*Do you want to lead the development of platforms that power next-generation AI solutions?*
*At Saab, we are expanding our capabilities in Data & AI platforms and are looking for a
 **Technical Lead** 
 to join the Software Excellence and Information Assurance (SWEIXA) team within the Surveillance business area.*
 In this senior role, you will combine technical leadership with hands-on engineering, guiding the design and implementation of cloud-native Data & AI platforms. You will play a key role in shaping our AI solutions, working closely with both engineers and stakeholders to ensure our platforms are secure, scalable and aligned with customer needs.
   

  

 You will also contribute with your expertise in AI tooling, its possibilities and limitations, and support the team in building robust environments for advanced AI solutions.
   

  

 Occasional travel may be required.
   

  

 Your Role
   

  

 As a Technical Lead, you will guide the architecture and development of our Data & AI platforms while also supporting the team with technical expertise and mentorship.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Designing the end-to-end architecture and technical implementation of our platforms
* Leading the development of complete AI systems and platform capabilities
* Understanding customer needs and translating business requirements into deployable architecture
* Taking the lead in deploying solutions, including setup, configuration and troubleshooting
* Ensuring efficient operations, observability and performance of Data & AI environments
* Creating guidelines and best practices for AI platform management
* Providing technical leadership and mentoring to team members
* Supporting the team with technical troubleshooting and problem solving
* Staying up to date with AI technologies and trends, contributing to the product roadmap


 Your Profile
   

  

 We are looking for a senior engineer who enjoys combining technical leadership, architecture and hands-on development. You are comfortable working with complex systems, large data environments and modern cloud-native technologies.
   

  

 You likely have experience with several of the following:
   

  

* Strong experience in Golang or other systems programming languages
* Implementation of Kubernetes operators
* Cloud architecture and cloud-native platforms
* DevOps practices including GitOps workflows
* Automation of repetitive tasks using Shell or Python
* Linux environments and container technologies
* CI/CD pipelines using tools such as ArgoCD, Argo Workflows or GitHub Actions
* Security practices such as scanning third-party libraries and container images
* Building Kubernetes environments in data-intensive industries
* Experience with AI model deployment
* Experience working with AI-assisted development or agentic AI


 You also have a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a technical field such as Data Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent experience.
   

  

 Experience in any of the following areas is considered a plus:
   

  

* Build and testing pipelines including unit, integration and end-to-end testing
* Security testing such as SAST and DAST
* LLM concepts such as prompting and RAG
* AI certifications (Google, AWS or Microsoft)
* NVIDIA developer certification
* Agile methodologies such as SAFe


 What we offer
   

  

* A dynamic and international work environment
* Opportunities for professional growth and development
* A competitive salary and benefits package
* The chance to work with cutting-edge AI technologies


 What You Will Be Part Of
   

  

 Here you have the opportunity to influence and contribute in your own unique way, and every contribution counts. We give you the opportunity to take on challenges and create smart innovations. In our friendly and tech-savvy world, there is space for you to grow. We are here to create safety and security for people and societies together.
   

  

 Saab is a leading defense and security company with a mission to help nations protect their populations and contribute to safety for people and societies. With 23,000 talented employees, Saab develops technology and solutions for a safer and more sustainable world.
   

  

 Saab develops, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control systems, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden but operates globally and is part of many nations’ defense capabilities.

title: Senior Backend Engineer (Python/Go) - Consumer Platform team
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

**Are you excited about building the systems that keep Wolt running for millions of customers every day?** 
 We’re looking for a pragmatic
 **Backend Developer** 
 with strong skills in
 **Python or Go** 
 to join our
 **Consumer Platform** 
**team** 
 –the crew behind the core consumer infrastructure and reliability efforts that make Wolt fast, stable, and scalable.
   

  

 The
 **Consumer Platform team** 
 plays a central role within Wolt’s engineering organization. We design and maintain the backend components that power Wolt’s consumer-facing experience–from critical purchase flows to the underlying systems that ensure reliability at scale. The team combines hands-on software development with elements of DevOps and Site Reliability Engineering (SRE), continuously improving how our systems perform and how our teams deliver.
   

  

 Known across Wolt for driving cross-team technical initiatives, the team works on challenges that impact the entire platform. Recent projects include scaling our purchase core to support split payments, developing an API gateway for Wolt’s most critical flows, and partnering with other teams to raise reliability standards company-wide.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Our team is primarily based in
 **Germany** 
**.**
**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Build and maintain high-throughput critical backend services in Python and Go
* Work across the complete development lifecycle—from architecture and design to deployment and monitoring
* Drive cross-team reliability initiatives and improve the scalability of Wolt’s platform
* Design and implement core services, shared libraries, internal tooling, and platform-level improvements that empower other teams and support our global consumer economy
* Define reliability best practices that make Wolt’s systems more robust


**Our Tech Stack:** 
 Python, Go, MongoDB, Redis, Datadog, CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes, AWS.
   

  

**Our humble expectations**
 We’re looking for someone with:
   

  

* Solid experience in backend development using Python, Go, or similar languages.
* A passion for core engineering problems like system design, optimization, and scalability.
* Experience working on high-traffic, production systems.
* (Bonus) Familiarity with reliability engineering or on-call practices.
* Strong ownership mindset and curiosity — someone who likes to understand how things work under the hood.
* Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate across teams
* A pragmatic, product-oriented mindset focused on solving real user problems


 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Dynamics 365 CE utvecklare
description:
**Att jobba som Dynamics 365 CE utvecklare**
 Som Dynamics 365 CE utvecklare på Skandia får du arbeta med verksamhetskritiska lösningar för kund- och ärendehantering inom både bank- och försäkringsområdet. Plattformen är central för vår affär, och vårt användande sträcker sig över Customer Service, Sales och Customer Insights.
   

  

 Du blir en nyckelperson i ett agilt team där teknik, affär och användarbehov möts. Din vardag kommer att innehålla utveckling och konfiguration i Dynamics 365 CE, arbete med Power Platform och optimering av integrationer mot andra interna system.
   

  

 Vi har en ambitiös utvecklingsplan för Dynamics och arbetar kontinuerligt med att modernisera vår arkitektur, bland annat genom molnbaserade lösningar i Azure, ständigt med fokus på hållbarhet, skalbarhet och kundnytta. Du blir också en viktig del i vår strävan att ligga i teknikens framkant, både vad gäller plattformen och hur vi arbetar.
   

  

 Du kommer att ingå i ett tvärfunktionellt team om cirka 15 kollegor med roller som utvecklare, mjukvaruarkitekt, testare och Scrum master. Vi arbetar tätt tillsammans, med stor öppenhet och en vilja att skapa värde, både för varandra och för våra kunder. Det här är ett team där vänlighet, nyfikenhet och framåtdriv är självklara delar av kulturen. I rollen får du vara med och påverka Skandias CRM-system där vi satsar stort med en tydlig riktning framåt.
   

  

 Vi arbetar hybrid vilket innebär arbete på kontoret varvat med distansarbete.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du att rapportera till gruppchef IT kund.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen**
 Ser vi att du har flera års erfarenhet av att utveckla och förvalta lösningar inom Dynamics 365 CE och Power Platform. Du är trygg i att arbeta med Power Automate, dataverse, utveckling av plugins och C#/.NET. Du har god förståelse för releasehantering och är van vid att bygga och optimera integrationer med hjälp av exempelvis Azure Functions och Service Bus. Ett grundkrav i rollen är att du kan svenska flytande, både i tal och skrift. Det är meriterande om du även har erfarenhet av JavaScript, TypeScript, React och arbete med säkerhetsaspekter i komplexa IT-miljöer.
   

  

 Vi har påbörjat resan med AI stöd inom CRM-området och vi ser det som en självklarhet att du vill ligga i framkant inom området.
   

  

 Som person är du en engagerad och nyfiken med ett genuint intresse för microsofts ekosystem och CRM-plattformens framtida möjligheter. Du är målmedveten där du driver ditt arbete framåt med både struktur och ansvarstagande. Samtidigt är du en god lagspelare som trivs i ett team, bidrar till ett öppet klimat och gärna delar med dig av din kunskap till andra.
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi jobbar med löpande urval så tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag. I ansökan kommer vi att ställa ett antal urvalsfrågor som ligger till grund för första urvalet. För att göra rekryteringsprocessen så rättvis och objektiv som möjligt kommer det att ingå intervjuer, tester, bakgrundskontroll samt digital referenstagning.
   

  

 Vi kommer att återkoppla till alla som söker oavsett om du går vidare eller inte.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rollen, vänligen kontakta rekryterande chef Jonas Olsson på jonas.olsson@skandia.se.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kopplat till rekryteringsprocess, vänligen ta kontakt med Talent Acquisition Partner Harald Brehmer på harald.brehmer@skandia.se.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**Mer om IT**
 Vi på Skandia IT är stolta över att vara en kundorienterad enhet som levererar effektiva och säkra lösningar för våra kunder. Med cirka 600 engagerade medarbetare är vi mitt i en spännande transformationsresa, där vi utvecklas tillsammans och har kul på vägen. Framåt tillsammans är vårt motto!
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt och har sedan 2017 använt oss av SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) ramverket, där leverans och kundvärde alltid står i centrum. Våra tågledningar och team, jobbar verksamhetsbaserat med aktiviteter som sprintplanering, daily stand-ups, team-synk, code reviews och retrospektiv.
   

  

 Var 12:e vecka samlas vi alla i vår ljusa och inspirerande Ljusgård på kontoret i Stockholm för 2 planeringsdagar. Planeringsperioden består av 6 tvåveckorssprintar, där den sista sprinten är en innovationssprint. Här får du chansen att, själv eller tillsammans med ditt team, utveckla och förfina våra system.

description:

title: Senior .NET Developer – Stockholm
description:
***Är du en systemutvecklare inom .NET som inte bara skriver kod, utan utvecklar lösningar som fungerar idag såväl som håller och utvecklas över tid? På Solita vill vi också något mer, vi tar initiativ, samarbetar och utforskar för att skapa en AI- och datadriven framtid.***




  





 Som Senior .NET Developer blir du del av ett växande område med runt 20 konsulter inom cloud, AI och systemutveckling. Samtidigt får du kollegor från hela Solita med expertis i allt från data, strategi och mycket mer att dela kunskap och perspektiv med, läs mer om det här och ta del av insikter från utvecklare på Solita redan nu i vår Dev blog här.
 



  





 När vi nu växer gör dina möjligheter också det, du får vara med och påverka kulturen, affären och din roll.
 



  





**En dag på Solita** 




 En dag på Solita kan börja med ett standup-möte med teamet på kunduppdraget, ibland består det av fler kollegor från Solita. Är det fredag kanske du jobbar från Solita kontoret i Stockholm för att starta dagen med frukost. Andra dagar jobbar du från kundens kontor eller hemifrån.
 



  





 Sen kliver du in i ditt arbete, när du stöter på ett problem söker du upp en lång diskussionstråd i slack med insikter från kollegor som haft samma problem. Andra gånger passar du på att fråga en kollega vid kaffemaskinen om deras perspektiv för att komma vidare. Du kan också delta i interna utbildningsmöten där vi delar kunskap om allt från nya tekniker och arbetssätt till välmående. Vissa dagar avslutar du med AW, brädspel, filmkväll eller annan aktivitet du och kollegor tycker är kul.
 



  





**Din roll som Senior .NET Developer** 




 I rollen som Senior .NET Developer utformar och utvecklar du robusta och skalbara lösningar, från idé till produktion, för organisationer inom alla möjliga branscher från sjukvård till e-handel, transport och energi. En kollega beskriver sin roll som en “
 *Glue Engineer* 
 ”; du binder samman olika projekt genom att kombinera kundinteraktion, förundersökningar och kodning. Det roligaste med rollen enligt en annan kollega är “att få kombinera teknik och problemlösning: förstå hur olika delar hänger ihop, bygga något som verkligen används, och se helheten fungera i praktiken.”
 



  





 Du kan exempelvis vara med och modernisera och migrera en plattform, utveckla nya datadrivna produkter eller optimera systemutvecklingsprocessen med implementationer av AI- eller automationslösningar där de skapar som mest värde.
 



  





**Känner du igen dig i följande?** 




 Du kan kommunicera på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift. Det är ett plus om du varit konsult tidigare, det avgörande är din förmåga att snabbt komma in i nya sammanhang och lära dig. Tack vare flera års erfarenhet av att bygga moderna lösningar genom hela utvecklingscykeln, främst i C# .NET, känner du dig trygg i rollen då du fått med dig:
 


* Vana att jobba med distribuerade system och eventdriven, skalbar arkitektur. Gärna med tekniker som Kafka, RabbitMQ eller Azure Service Bus.
* God förståelse för Dev(Sec)Ops-principer, CI/CD och orkestrering.
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar som Azure, AWS eller GCP. Har du jobbat med containerization (Kubernetes, Docker) eller Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi, Bicep) är det en extra tillgång.
* Nyfikenhet på AI i utvecklingsarbetet: hur verktyg som GitHub Copilot, OpenAI API:er eller ML-integrerade pipelines kan göra kodningen smartare och effektivare.



  





 Vi letar inte bara efter tekniska skills, vi vill jobba med dig som tar ansvar för att bygga rätt lösningar på rätt sätt genom att utmana med omtanke. Du ser kod som ett hantverk, inte bara ett medel till funktion: du bryr dig om kvalitet, läsbarhet och hållbarhet. Du kommer trivas hos oss om du tycker om att dela med dig av din kunskap lika mycket som du är nyfiken på- och lyfter andras.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 Vår företagskultur är väldigt viktig för oss. Vi värdesätter låg hierarki, självständighet och ansvar, värdeskapande arbete och trevliga kollegor. Här kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, och här kan du bläddra bland våra tech-bloggar.
 


* **Meningsfulla projekt:** 
 Arbeta i en agil miljö där du kan påverka teknikval och arbetssätt för att skapa de bästa lösningarna
* **Flexibilitet och autonomi** 
 för att utforma ditt arbete med flextider– läs mer från vår blogg här.
* **Ständig utveckling:** 
 Vi erbjuder kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling för att säkerställa att våra medarbetare ligger längst fram i teknikutvecklingen.
* **Innovativ kultur:** 
 Arbeta tillsammans med några av de främsta experterna inom data, analys och utveckling – läs mer i bloggen här.



  





 Utöver detta får du även ta del av följande
 **förmåner** 
 :
 



 💰 Fast lön oberoende av beläggningsgrad med möjlighet till löneväxling till ditt pensionssparande
 



 🏦 Pensionsavsättning i linje med ITP1 samt möjlighet till löneväxling till ditt pensionssparande vid inkomst över 8,07 inkomstbasbelopp
 



 🏖️ 30 semesterdagar
 



 🏥 Sjukvårdsförsäkring för både din mentala och fysiska hälsa som täcker dig även utanför tjänstetid
 



 🏋️ Friskvårdsbidrag på 5000 kr via Benifex (tidigare Benify)
 



 🔗 Intern coach för att stödja ditt välbefinnande
 



 🪩 After Work och hobbyaktiviteter
 



 🥐 Fredagsfrukost
 



  





**Vilka är vi?** 




 Solita är ett värderingsstyrt konsultbolag med över 2200 medarbetare i 9 länder, varav ca 230 i Sverige. Vår storlek gör oss tillräckligt stora för att vara en stabil och innovativ arbetsgivare, men samtidigt tillräckligt små för att värna om våra medarbetare och kunder. Med bred kompetens inom digital transformation erbjuder vi en dynamisk arbetsmiljö. Hos oss får du friheten att utvecklas, både professionellt och personligt.
 



  





**Intresserad av att höra mer?** 




 Låter det som en intressant möjlighet? Skicka in din ansökan och bli en del av vårt team som ligger i framkant inom systemutveckling!
 



  





 Om du har några frågor, skriv gärna till Rebecca Hammel på LinkedIn eller via mail till rebecca.hammel@solita.se. Du kan också kontakta rekryteringsansvarig, Louise Doverholt på LinkedIn eller via mail till louise.doverholt@solita.se .
 



  





**Hur ser processen ut?** 




 I rekryteringsprocessen tror vi på en snabb och effektiv process. Du ansöker med CV eller LinkedIn och svarar på några korta frågor. Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande. Om vi ser en potentiell matchning, bjuder vi in dig till ett första möte för att lära känna dig och berätta mer om vår kultur och våra värderingar på Solita. I andra intervjun fokuserar vi på din tekniska kompetens och din erfarenhet. Om allt går bra tar vi oss vidare till sista steget där vi presenterar ett erbjudande och välkomnar dig som ny Solitan!

title: IAM Developer
description:
**Working as IAM Developer** 




 We are now looking for an IAM Developer with a focus on Omada Identity, who is eager to grow in a hands-on technical role. In this position, you will work closely with senior consultants, architects, and business analysts, supporting the delivery of IAM solutions from configuration and testing to documentation and troubleshooting. This is an excellent opportunity for you with a structured mindset, strong analytical skills, and a genuine interest in learning and developing within the IAM domain.
 



  





 You will work at our costumer who is located in Solna, Stockholm. They are an international energy company operating across several European markets. The organization develops and operates energy production, distribution, and related digital solutions, with a strong focus on sustainability, security, and long-term infrastructure.
 



  





**Typical Responsibilities:** 




 · Support configuration of Omada modules (roles, policies, simple workflows)
 



 · Assist in implementing request/approval workflows and forms
 



 · Execute testing activities (provisioning, synchronization, recertification)
 



 · Perform initial troubleshooting steps (reading logs, identifying basic issues)
 



 · Contribute to documentation, technical specifications, and handover materials
 



 · Maintain attribute mappings, basic connector settings, and identity information
 



  





**Being a consultant at Nexer Tech Talent** 




 For this role, you will be employed by Nexer Tech Talent but work at our costumer in Solna.
 



 You will be coached by a mentor
 
 and by a consultant manager at Nexer Tech Talent. After successful completion of the consulting assignment, the intention is that you will be offered employment at our costumer.
 



  





**Desired qualifications:** 




 · Bachlor's och Master's degree within an relevant field
 



 · Experience within IAM, PIM, PAM, IDP or IGA
 



 · Basic understanding of IAM concepts (provisioning, lifecycle, role models)
 



 · Initial experience with Omada Identity or similar IAM solutions
 



 · Basic skills in SQL (read/write simple queries)
 



 · Structured approach, willingness to learn, analytical mindset
 



 · Ability to understand business requirements and support technical mapping
 



 · Very good knowledge of Swedish and English
 



  





**Nice-to-have:** 




 · Experience with PowerShell, REST APIs
 



 · Basic knowledge of Azure / Entra ID
 



 · ITIL Foundation or comparable basic
 



  





**Application** 




 Does this sound like you? We are constantly screening resumes, therefore please submit your application as soon as possible. If you have any questions, you are welcome to contact Tech Recruiter Molly Rytter at molly.rytter@nexergroup.com.
 



 We are looking forward to hearing from you!
 



  





**About Nexer Tech Talent** 




*Nexer Tech Talent is part of the Nexer Group – a tech company with deep roots in Swedish entrepreneurship and innovation.
